📡 Catalyst Plays — Radar Finds
🔬 OTLK — Outlook Therapeutics
BLA PDUFA ~July 29 (31 days) · Current broker accessible ✓
🟢 INVESTIGATE 4/5
Catalyst: 3rd BLA for ONL-1101 (wet AMD) — prior rejections were manufacturing-only, not efficacy. EU/UK already approved as LUMEVOQ. US approval = regulatory convergence play.
Market cap: <$200M | Short interest: 16.7% float — squeeze potential on approval
Probability: ~55% (3rd submission + EU approved = strong signal; 2 prior rejections weigh on base rate)
✅ Positive: ~+100–150% | 💀 Negative: ~−80%
Smart money: Unusual options activity detected this week
Halal: ⚠️ Unverified — check Musaffa (ophthalmology drug, confirm interest income structure)
Price: ⚠️ Unconfirmed — verify before entering. Run analyze OTLK for full deep dive.

Market cap: ~$800M | Short interest: Moderate

Priority 1 — THIS WEEKEND: VRDN — PDUFA in 2 days. IBKR must approve to enter at ~$17.90. Target: 12 shares × $17.90 = $214.80 + $3 commission = $217.80 total (27% of account).

Priority 2 — IBKR pending: VERA — Run analyze VERA first to re-derive stop/TP at $43 entry. 5 shares × $43.12 = $215.60 + $3 = $218.60 total.

Priority 3 — Current broker, now: OTLK — available on current broker. Verify halal + price first. Small position ~$100–150 given 3rd BLA risk profile.

Priority 4 — Current broker: MNKD — lower conviction than OTLK. Device upgrade = lower reward. Consider after OTLK is sized.
📚 Concept #30 of 30 — Final Module
Sector Rotation Part 2 — ETF Flows as Real-Time Signal
The core idea: Before money rotates into individual biotech stocks, it rotates into biotech ETFs — specifically XBI (equal-weight, small/mid) and IBB (large-cap-heavy). Watching these two gives you 1–3 day advance warning of sector moves.

XBI vs IBB:
• XBI (SPDR S&P Biotech ETF) = equal-weight. XBI outperforming IBB = small/mid biotech being bought — this is where VRDN, VERA, OTLK, MNKD live.
• IBB (iShares Nasdaq Biotech ETF) = market-cap-weight. IBB outperforming = big pharma getting flows (AMGN, GILD, REGN). Defensive rotation signal.

Practical use Monday morning: Check XBI volume before anything else. If XBI has unusual inflows with VRDN PDUFA pending, that is institutional positioning ahead of the decision. XBI up >1.5% on above-average volume while VRDN is flat = accumulation. XBI down on high volume = distribution. Use as secondary confirmation — primary signal is still the binary event date and approval probability.

The filter rule: XBI/IBB ratio rising → small/mid biotech rotation beginning → individual catalyst names get bid up 2–3 days later. Stocks with imminent binary catalysts get hit first.
🎓 30/30 concepts complete. You have covered: P/E multiples, earnings mechanics, options signals, short squeezes, sector rotation, liquidity traps, dark pools, FCF, EBITDA, hyperscaler capex, and ETF flows. Foundation is solid. Practice mode: apply these live to VRDN and VERA this week.
